news.t: Defiance ETFs Announces Temporary Trading Halt of the Defiance Daily 2X Space ETF (SPCL) on Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc.
SPCL Becomes the First and Only U.S. ETF With 2X SpaceX Exposure on IPO Day
Defiance Launches XAIL, the World's First 2X Leverage Pure Space ETF

holdings.infoBox: SPCL is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 95.44%, ECHOSTAR CORPORATION-SWAP-MREX-L at 20.88%, AST SPACEMOBILE INC.-SWAP-MREX-L at 20.20%, ROCKET LAB CORPORATION-SWAP-MREX-L at 19.89%, and VIASAT INC.-SWAP-MREX-L at 19.81%.

overview.description: The Defiance Pure Space Daily 2X Strategy ETF (SPCL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed and seeks to  deliver 2x the daily performance of a concentrated portfolio of space-related companies using derivatives. The strategy aims for leveraged exposure to firms involved in satellite systems, launch technologies, and the broader space economy. SPCL was launched on Apr 7, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
